creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Coreblog2 is disappeared and distfile no more exists. Upstream (coreblog.org) switched to coreblog3 (Google App Engine-driven blog) and no more have zope version. So this port is useless and should be deprecated and removed.

Noone depend on this one and port is unmaintained since 01 Sep 2008.
